description: Composition Black jersey made of 100% polyester, engineered with ClimaLite technology, has a polo neck, short sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes in white on the shoulders, half placket with buttons on the chest, contoured side panels and brand name in reflective print on the left chest Fitting Regular  Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logoSweat it out in comfort on the tracks or at the gym in this ClimaLite engineered jersey from adidas. The mesh panels regulate your body temperature, keeping you fresh and comfortable, while the polyester fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with adidas trackpants and running shoes for the best resultsModel statistics  The model wears size M in jerseysHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
